| Iac event source wiring | ✅ `full` | `2026-06-24` | 5501 | `internal/engine/pulumi_edges.go`<br>`internal/engine/pulumi_wiring.go`<br>`internal/engine/pulumi_wiring_test.go` | #5501 (stack epic #5479): Pulumi-AWS event-source / trigger WIRING resources now emit a direct SOURCE→TARGET DEPENDS_ON edge carrying reason=event_source — the same edge kind+reason CDK's addEventSource pass produces, so wiring is uniform across IaC tools. applyPulumiWiringEdges (pulumi_wiring.go) runs in applyPulumiEdges/applyPulumiEdgesPython Pass 5 alongside the property stamp + output_ref mining: when the resource's construct_type matches a wiring type (suffix-matched, lambda_-alias tolerant) it resolves the source-arg and target-arg references (queue.arn→queue, fn.name→fn) to their resource nodes and wires source→target. Recognised wiring types + (source→target): aws.lambda.EventSourceMapping (eventSourceArn→functionName), aws.s3.BucketNotification (bucket→lambdaFunctions[].lambdaFunctionArn / queues / topics, fan-out), aws.apigatewayv2.Integration (apiId→integrationUri) + apigateway.Integration (restApi→uri), aws.sns.TopicSubscription (topic→endpoint), aws.cloudwatch.EventTarget (rule→arn), aws.lambda.Permission (sourceArn→function). Edge props iac_tool=pulumi + pattern_type=pulumi_program + reason=event_source + event_source=<construct_type>. Value-asserting tests pin the exact source→target edge: TestPulumiTS_EventSourceMapping_Wiring (jobs→worker), _BucketNotification_Wiring (data→proc), _ApiGatewayIntegration_Wiring (http→handler), TestPulumiPy_EventSourceMapping_Wiring (jobs→worker), and _NonWiringResourceNoEventSourceEdge (an ordinary resource ref stays output_ref). TS + Python; Go/C# wiring deferred. DEPLOY-DEFERRED. |

Honest-missing. |
| Iac resource property extraction | ✅ `full` | — | 5501 | `internal/engine/iac_code_properties.go`<br>`internal/engine/pulumi_edges.go`<br>`internal/engine/pulumi_properties_test.go`<br>`internal/engine/pulumi_wiring_test.go` | epic #4194 + #5501: Pulumi stamps a CURATED, bounded allow-list of literal SCALAR config props onto each resource's SCOPE.InfraResource, alongside (not replacing) the existing output_ref/depends_on edge mining. Pass 5 (pulumiTSResourceArgsRe TS / pulumiPyResourceArgsRe Python) feeds the args body to the shared stampScalarProps closure (pulumi_edges.go), which calls iacCodeExtractScalarProperties (iac_code_properties.go) and merges curated key=value onto the entity by logical name, right before applyPulumiArgEdges runs the edge mining (so both happen). Curated keys (case/underscore-folded, both camelCase + snake_case): instanceType/machineType/size/sku/tier/instanceClass/nodeType/vmSize, memorySize/memory/timeout, runtime/engine/engineVersion/version, handler, count/desiredCapacity/desiredCount/minSize/maxSize/minCapacity/maxCapacity/replicas, port/protocol, allocatedStorage/storageType, and the #5501 AWS additions bucket (S3 name), billingMode + streamViewType (DynamoDB), fifoQueue + visibilityTimeoutSeconds (SQS), readCapacity/writeCapacity. ONLY literal scalars are stamped (quoted strings, numbers, true/false); Output/member-access refs (ami.id, sizing.nodeType, data.id) and object/array values are SKIPPED (they stay reference edges). Value-asserting tests pin exact key=value: TestPulumi_ScalarProps_TS/_Python (existing), and the #5501 fixtures TestPulumiTS_EventSourceMapping_Wiring (worker handler=index.handler/runtime/memorySize; jobs fifoQueue=true/visibilityTimeoutSeconds=60), _BucketNotification_Wiring (data bucket=my-data-bucket), TestPulumiTS_DynamoBillingMode (orders billingMode=PAY_PER_REQUEST/streamViewType=NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES). TS + Python; Pulumi-Go/C#/Java property stamping deferred. DEPLOY-DEFERRED. |
